contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Legal Entity Structuring — Governance & SVH Prep
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/509
  
  Details:
  One-hour governance session to finalize the DAO's legal entity structure ahead of the June 26 SVH Capital meeting.
  
  Input from Gary: Full brief from Claude with corrections to the legal entity structuring document, including:
  - CTA section rewrite (federal BOI reporting now moot, state transparency laws are the live risk)
  - DUNA auto-conversion correction (statute runs downward only, not upward)
  - TDG governance rights clarification (voting rights, not a security)
  - TrueTech Inc independence (separate entity, not DUNA subsidiary — avoids UBIT)
  - Buyback reserve mechanism (no committed reserve, formula on truesight.me, discretionary)
  - Withdrawal methods correction (Wise handles bank transfers + PIX; Venmo/Zelle/Western Union manual)
  - Impact fund strategy reset (no committed backend, deferred until donation-type funder appears)
  - SVH approach narrowed to one Howey question
  
  Outcomes:
  - Resolved three-entity stack down to ~$50 MVP (Wyoming UNA via OtoCo)
  - TrueTech Inc confirmed as independent entity — avoids UBIT and 501(c)(3) jeopardy
  - UNA needs no bank account — TrueTech Inc handles all money flows
  - TDG buyback: TrueTech buys at NAV from operating cash, discretionary, formula on truesight.me
  - Howey question framed correctly (includes buyback feature as the actual risk)
  - Impact fund channel deferred
  - SVH approach: one question — does TDG pass the Howey Test?
  - Final proposal generated as PDF and merged to agentic_ai_context/main (PR #509)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: LEGAL_ENTITY_STRUCTURING_PROPOSAL.pdf
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/LEGAL_ENTITY_STRUCTURING_PROPOSAL.pdf
